title: Add item links to date column sync calendars
excerpt: I create webcal: calendars from the date related columns on my boards so that I can see my due dates in my outlook calendar.  Please add a link to the item in the body of the calendar invite so that I can easily jump to …

posts.author: TheSleepingBarber (Ken)
posts.cookedHtml: I create webcal: calendars from the date related columns on my boards so that I can see my due dates in my outlook calendar. Please add a link to the item in the body of the calendar invite so that I can easily jump to the item in Monday. Thanks.
